name: Ollama Prompt Lab Reference Pack
description: Portable SQLite reference pack containing canonical example jobs and curated non-dry-run historical prompt-eval runs from the vendable _ollama-prompt-lab package.

selection_policy.rule: Include canonical example job specs and all non-dry-run run folders present in the vendable package at build time.

first_queries: SELECT key, value FROM dataset_meta ORDER BY key;
SELECT * FROM agent_onboarding ORDER BY step_order;
SELECT run_id, models_json, keep_count, reject_count FROM prompt_runs ORDER BY run_id;
SELECT model, prompt_variant_id, deterministic_pass_rate, recommendation FROM prompt_results ORDER BY run_id, model;
